tiers.label: T2 — + Linguistic priors
tiers.injected: OCP + positional + word-bigrams + root co-occurrence (Semitic phonology)

tiers.label: T3 — + Human anchors
tiers.method: Beam + tight phono groups + 10 pan-Semitic anchors
tiers.injected: 10 pan-Semitic cognate anchors (Segert 1984; Huehnergard 2012) + phono groups

conclusion: Tier 3 (full stack) achieves 30/30 = 100.0%. Attribution of improvement above floor (0/30): algorithm=7%, linguistic priors=3%, human anchors=90%. This table should accompany every published benchmark result to clearly separate model capability from hypothesis injection.
